title: Junior Revenue Manager at Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners:
Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in PMS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners!
